message:
Add output/Truncate branch coverage tests

Cover previously untested branches in output.Truncate:
- maxLen <= 0 (return empty string)
- Large first rune with small maxLen (return empty)
- Multibyte boundary handling
- Final return branch (all runes <= targetLen)

Truncate: 85.0% → 100%
Overall output package: 79.7% → 80.3%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
